MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Monte Haney, plaintiff, appearing telephonically on his own behalf;
Sean Patterson, Esq., appearing for defendant Frank McGuire.

At the start of the hearing, Judge Jackson disclosed that she knows defendant Frank McGuire and has worked with him before. This fact does not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No questions were asked or objections raised.

Hearing held. The Court informs Mr. Haney that he needs to effectuate proper service on the defendant and instructs the clerk to provide Mr. Haney with the proof of service and notice and acknowledgment of recipt forms. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 24, 2018 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: G. Gonzales. Proceedings not reported.
